reason: Verified browser-use feature: Agent successfully opened a browser, navigated to https://example.com, retrieved the page title "Example Domain", and closed the browser.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Homepage loaded successfully with agent list displayed.
Clicked on "QA-20260630-230934-vhy3" agent in sidebar — Agent page loaded with conversation interface ready for input.
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." into the input field — Message successfully entered and send button became available.
Clicked send message button — Message sent successfully and agent started processing in "working" status.
Waited up to 3 minutes for agent response — Agent completed work in 11 seconds with full response.

Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Response clearly displays: "The page title is 'Example Domain'" and "Done — the page at https://example.com loaded with the heading/title 'Example Domain'. Browser closed."
